_notes: Agency-specific winner database. Built from HigherGov data + Brian training. Update when new intel comes in.
_methodology: For each agency: who won SB-eligible contracts in the last 3 years in relevant NAICS codes? Filter by set-aside type when applicable.

census_bureau._notes: Key NAICS at Census: 541511, 541512, 541519, 512110. Major vehicles: STARS III, OASIS+, agency BPAs

app_modernization_sb.name: Vidoori Inc
app_modernization_sb.why: $173M Enterprise Testing BPA + $7.3M CMMU AI/ML modernization + $4.7M internet data collection system. Multiple Census BPAs. One of the strongest Census relationships in the SB space.
app_modernization_sb.evidence: $173M Census BPA, $7.3M CMMU modernization, $4.7M internet data collection

app_modernization_sb.name: T-Rex Solutions (often teams with Vidoori)
app_modernization_sb.why: Former 2020 Census technical integrator ($1.6B ESF SE&I BPA). Deep Census IT systems engineering knowledge. Frequently sub or JV on Census modernization work. Incumbent risk.
app_modernization_sb.evidence: 2020 Census integrator $1.6B, deep Census systems knowledge

app_modernization_sb.name: Spatial Front Inc
app_modernization_sb.why: SB with $17M+ in confirmed Census tech awards. Cloud and data engineering. Active on Census SB set-asides.

app_modernization_sb.name: Amivero LLC
app_modernization_sb.why: SB with $5M Census SB set-aside awards. Cloud and data modernization focus.

app_modernization_sb.name: Great Hill Solutions
app_modernization_sb.why: 8(a) with multiple Census sole-source awards ($7M). Growing Census relationship.

tech_sb.name: Sienna Systems

comms_sb.name: ICF International (large business sub only on SB)

mcc._notes: MCC uses USAID/State Dept contractor ecosystem. International dev firms dominate.

intl_dev.name: Chemonics International
intl_dev.why: Largest MCC/USAID implementer globally. Multiple MCC compact country programs. Likely bidder or incumbent on any MCC advisory work. Primary competitor.
intl_dev.evidence: MCC/USAID — largest implementer, multiple compact countries

intl_dev.name: DevTech Systems
intl_dev.why: MCC/USAID M&E and advisory firm. Workforce development, education advisory, behavioral research in developing countries. Focused competitor on MCC HCD advisory.
intl_dev.evidence: MCC, USAID — M&E, workforce, education advisory

intl_dev.name: Creative Associates International
intl_dev.why: International education, TVET, and workforce programs in developing countries. Directly competes on education and workforce advisory for MCC compact countries.
intl_dev.evidence: USAID, MCC — TVET, education, workforce in LMIC

defense_health_agency._notes: DHA: IT systems, health data, financial management tools. Software and data tools at DHA.

software_tools_sb.name: Pull from HigherGov: DHA + 541511/541512
software_tools_sb.why: For DHA software tools: search HigherGov Contracts filtered by Defense Health Agency + NAICS 541511/541512 to find who has won financial management, human capital, or data software contracts at DHA recently. This is a specialized DHA IT market — the incumbent and recent winners are the strongest competitors.
software_tools_sb.evidence: Pull from HigherGov when RFP details available

software_tools_sb.name: Experienced DHA IT SB Contractors (GDIT, ManTech as sub)
software_tools_sb.why: DHA software/financial tools tend to go to IT-focused SB firms with cleared capabilities. Consider ManTech or GDIT as large business subs — they cannot prime SB set-asides but bring DHA IT depth.
software_tools_sb.sa: Large business sub only on SB

education_ies._notes: IES: Program evaluation, research methodology, education data. Key competitors: Mathematica, Westat, Abt Associates, RTI International

program_evaluation_sb.name: Mathematica Policy Research
program_evaluation_sb.why: Premier federal evaluation firm. Wins IES and ED evaluation contracts regularly. They are THE main competitor on any IES program evaluation work — they essentially invented rigorous federal program evaluation. Check their IES-specific awards on HigherGov.
program_evaluation_sb.sa: Mid-size (may qualify as SB depending on NAICS)
program_evaluation_sb.evidence: IES, ED, HHS — program evaluation, RCT design, education research

program_evaluation_sb.name: Westat
program_evaluation_sb.why: Federal statistical research firm. Survey methodology and program evaluation at Census, ED, and HHS. Regular IES contractor.
program_evaluation_sb.sa: Small Business eligible on some NAICS
program_evaluation_sb.evidence: ED, Census, HHS — surveys, evaluation, statistical research

program_evaluation_sb.name: Abt Associates
program_evaluation_sb.why: Federal research and evaluation firm. Education, health, and workforce program evaluation. Active on IES and ED evaluation contracts.
program_evaluation_sb.evidence: ED, IES, Labor — program evaluation, workforce research

_large_business_subs._notes: Large/medium businesses that have proven agency relationships — ideal subs on SB set-asides. Cannot prime SB but bring agency credibility + technical depth.

census_cyber_it.name: Iron Vine Security LLC
census_cyber_it.why: $95M Census Enterprise Cybersecurity Support. This is the Census cyber firm. If BLN24 has a cyber gap on a Census contract, Iron Vine is the sub to approach — they already have Census cyber clearances and relationship.
census_cyber_it.lb_note: May be SB — check size standard for their NAICS

census_cyber_it.name: IgniteAction LLC
census_cyber_it.why: $19.2M Census OCISS cloud infrastructure + cybersecurity, zero trust. JV of Ignite IT + ActioNet. Active Census cloud/cyber relationship. Cannot prime SB if over size standard.
census_cyber_it.evidence: Census $19.2M OCISS cloud infrastructure + cyber (USASpending confirmed)
census_cyber_it.lb_note: Check size standard — JV may qualify as SB

cms_tech.name: Cognosante MVH LLC
cms_tech.why: Won $24.8M CMS contract for health exchange monitoring. Active CMS technology relationship. Medium-size firm with confirmed CMS IT track record.
cms_tech.evidence: CMS $24.8M — health exchange operational oversight and monitoring (confirmed)
cms_tech.lb_note: Medium business — may qualify SB on some NAICS; confirmed CMS experience

hud_comms.name: ICF International
hud_comms.why: Dominant health and public affairs comms firm. While too large to prime on SB set-asides, ICF brings deep HUD/HHS outreach credibility as a sub. Their name on a proposal raises credibility with HUD evaluators who know their work.
hud_comms.evidence: HHS, CMS, HUD — major health and public affairs comms contracts
hud_comms.lb_note: Large business — cannot prime SB; sub arrangement adds credibility

comms_usaspending.why: $11.2M CDC HIV communications and partnership support. Research + communications firm with confirmed CDC relationship.

comms_usaspending.name: Palladian Partners Inc
comms_usaspending.why: $9.5M CDC DHDSP Million Hearts communications. Active CDC health comms SB competitor.

uscis._notes: USCIS: Major IT and outreach. E-Verify, SAVE, I-9, VER program. Key NAICS 541511, 541513.

tech_confirmed.name: Slalom Inc
tech_confirmed.why: $128M USCIS VER Future contract — this is THE incumbent on VER program work. Slalom won the VER Future modernization. Any VER-related opp, Slalom is the primary competitor to watch.
tech_confirmed.evidence: USCIS $128.7M VER Future (USASpending confirmed — DIRECT INCUMBENT on VER work)

tech_confirmed.name: Pluribus Digital
tech_confirmed.why: $80.6M USCIS DevSecOps services. Active USCIS digital and tech relationship. SB competitor for USCIS digital work.

fhwa_dot._notes: FHWA/DOT: Dominated by SAIC on IT infrastructure. Large business. For SB set-asides, look for SB IT firms.

tech_lb.name: SAIC (large business — sub only on SB)
tech_lb.why: $214M+ across 4 FHWA IT infrastructure contracts. SAIC is THE FHWA IT firm. On SB set-asides they cannot prime, making them a potential sub. On full & open, they are the dominant competitor.
tech_lb.evidence: FHWA $214M+ IT infrastructure (USASpending confirmed — dominant player)

fema._notes: FEMA: GDIT and IBM dominate on full & open. For SB, look for sub opportunities under GDIT.

tech_lb.name: GDIT (General Dynamics IT — large business, sub only on SB)
tech_lb.why: $396M across 3 FEMA IT contracts (contact center, flood insurance, OC3). GDIT is the dominant FEMA IT player. Cannot prime SB but ideal sub relationship if BLN24 needs FEMA credibility.

_generic_fallback_note: Fearless Solutions and Coforma are generic HCD/digital firms. Only use them as competitors if they have confirmed work at THIS specific agency. Check USASpending first.
